expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers highlight activation, persistence, deselection, and interaction safety for bar chart and heatmap
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the focus is explicitly stated and then enumerated under “Phase 5b — Shipment Checkpoint: Highlighting & Interaction Safety (Bar + Heatmap)”: it lists “Highlight activation”, “Highlight persistence”, “Highlight deselection / clearing”, and “Interaction safety” specifically for “bar charts” and “heatmaps”.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly framed as “QA Plan Orchestrator — Phase 5b Checkpoint (Advisory)” and includes “Primary phase/checkpoint under test: phase5b” plus a dedicated “Phase 5b — Shipment Checkpoint” section, indicating alignment with phase5b (even though it reports evidence is blocked).
